result.stdout:
Description:
  C# Chinese String Refactor Tool

Usage:
  ChineseStringRefactorTool [options]

Options:
  -s, --source <source> (REQUIRED)  Source directory or file path to scan for C# files
  -x, --xml <xml>                   Path to CimforceLanguageAPI.xml file
  -o, --output <output>             Output directory for modified files (default: same as source)
  -b, --backup                      Create backup of original files
  --version                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

  -b, --backup                      Create backup of original files
  --version                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information
